concerns.detail: Identifies a specific student/postdoctoral researcher by their educational credentials (NWPU undergraduate, PKU postdoc) and references specific social media incidents (Xiaohongshu criticism), which combined with the lab context allows de-anonymization of a private individual who is not the subject professor.
concerns.excerpt: 组里有个西工大本科，北大博后，抢一作成瘾，去年被xhs狂喷（这位哥别删了，北大人尽皆知你）
